title: Password reset via email
background: Users frequently forget passwords, which creates support tickets. Provide a self-serve reset flow.
goals: Allow users to reset password without contacting support

user_stories.want: set a new password with a valid token

acceptance_criteria: Entering an email always shows a generic success message (avoid account enumeration)
Reset token expires in 15 minutes and can be used only once
Rate limiting is applied to reset requests

security: Store token hashes (never store raw tokens)
Audit log with userId + request IP

open_questions: Should we also invalidate active sessions after reset?
